violations.text: The (door frame ) in the (kitchen ) area is in poor repair. Observed rusted holes. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/25/2026

Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. PIC labeled during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the 1 door freezer have an accumulation of frost buildup. New Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2025

Staff failed to sanitize equipment and utensils after washing and rinsing them. After being cleaned, equipment and utensils must be sanitized in the 3-bay-sink or dishwasher. New Violation. Correct By: 03/22/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2024

The door to the outside, located in the entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 12/14/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the freezer shelving have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 12/07/2023
